name: monsoon
documentation: # PyMonsoon

modules.name: Monsoon.setup
documentation: Special thanks to Tom Christie for providing this template.
Adapted from the instructions at https://tom-christie.github.io/articles/pypi/

classes.name: Monsoon.setup.MyInstall
documentation: see http://www.niteoweb.com/blog/setuptools-run-custom-code-during-install
This is so we can call "make" automatically during setup

classes.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setMainFineResistorOffset
documentation: LVPM Calibration value, 8-bits signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setMainCoarseResistorOffset
documentation: LVPM Calibration value, 8-bits signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setUsbFineResistorOffset
documentation: LVPM Calibration value, 8-bits signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setUsbCoarseResistorOffset
documentation: LVPM Calibration value, 8-bits signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setAuxCoarseResistorOffset
documentation: LVPM Calibration value, 8-bits signed, ohms = 0.1 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.calibrateMainVoltage
documentation: Internal voltage calibration, affects accuracy of setHVMainVoltage

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.resetPowerMonitor
documentation: Reset the PIC.  Causes disconnect.

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setPowerupTime
documentation: time in milliseconds that the powerup current limit is in effect.

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setTemperatureLimit
documentation: Temperature limit in Signed Q7.8 format

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setUsbPassthroughMode
documentation: Sets USB Passthrough mode according to value.  Off = 0, On = 1, Auto = 2

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setMainFineScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setMainCoarseScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setUSBFineScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setUSBCoarseScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setAuxFineScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setAuxCoarseScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setVoltageChannel
documentation: Sets voltage channel:  Value 00 = Main & USB voltage measurements.  Value 01 = Main & Aux voltage measurements

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.SetPowerUpCurrentLimit
documentation: Sets power-up current limit.  HV Amps = 15.625*(1.0-powerupCurrentLimit/65535) #LV amps = 8.0*(1.0-powerupCurrentLimit/1023.0)

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.SetRunCurrentLimit
documentation: Sets runtime current limit        HV Amps = 15.625*(1.0-powerupCurrentLimit/65535) #LV amps = 8.0*(1.0-powerupCurrentLimit/1023.0)

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.setMainVoltage
documentation: Voltage = value * 1048576

documentation: Zero-level offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.SetUSBCoarseZeroOffset
documentation: Zero-level offset

documentation: Read-only, gets the firmware version

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.ProtocolVersion
documentation: Read-only, gets the Protocol version

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.OpCodes.HardwareModel
documentation: 0 = unknown, 1 = LV, 2 = HV

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.powerupCurrentLimit
documentation: Max current during startup before overcurrent protection circuit activates.  LVPM is 0-8A, HVPM is 0-15A.

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.runtimeCurrentLimit
documentation: Max current during runtime before overcurrent protection circuit activates.  LVPM is 0-8A, HVPM is 0-15A.

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.powerupTime
documentation: Time in ms the powerupcurrent limit will be used.

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.temperatureLimit
documentation: Temperature limit in Signed Q7.8 format

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.usbPassthroughMode
documentation: Off = 0, On = 1, Auto = 2

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.mainFineScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.auxCoarseScale
documentation: HVPM Calibration value, 32-bits, unsigned

documentation: signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.mainCoarseResistorOffset
documentation: signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

class_variables.name: Monsoon.Operations.statusPacket.usbFineResistorOffset
documentation: signed, ohms = 0.05 + 0.0001*offset

classes.name: Monsoon.Operations.BootloaderCommands

classes.name: Monsoon.Operations.BootloaderMemoryRegions

classes.name: Monsoon.Operations.SampleType
documentation: Corresponds to the sampletype field from a sample packet.

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.setTemperatureLimit
documentation: Sets the fan turn-on temperature limit.  Only valid in HVPM.

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.getSerialNumber
documentation: Get the device serial number

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.setDefaultScaleValues
documentation:
Loads default scaling values into the Power Monitor.
Warning:  This wipes away existing calibration data.  Use with Caution.

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.raw_from_degrees
documentation: For setting the fan temperature limit.  Only valid in HVPM.

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.degrees_from_raw
documentation: For setting the fan temperature limit.  Only valid in HVPM

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.BulkRead
documentation:
Read sample packets.
Returns an array of 64 byte packets concatenated together.
Number of packets depends on the protocol selected.

methods.name: Monsoon.HVPM.Monsoon.resetToBootloader
documentation:
Programmatically reset to bootloader mode.  
Reconnect using the interface in reflash.py

classes.name: Monsoon.calibrationData.calibrationData

methods.name: Monsoon.calibrationData.calibrationData.getRefCal
documentation: Get average reference calibration measurement

methods.name: Monsoon.calibrationData.calibrationData.getZeroCal
documentation: Get average zero calibration value

methods.name: Monsoon.calibrationData.calibrationData.addRefCal
documentation: Add reference calibration measurement.

methods.name: Monsoon.calibrationData.calibrationData.addZeroCal
documentation: Add zero calibration measurement.

Stores calibration data for every Monsoon channel.
Uses a rolling queue of size self.calsToKeep to store the last x measurements.

modules.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

class_variables.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.ErrorHandlingModes.off
documentation: No error checking.  Use if you're seeing a large number of dropped samples

class_variables.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.ErrorHandlingModes.full
documentation: Automatically handle errors

class_variables.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.ErrorHandlingModes.debug
documentation: Handle errors + output logging data.  Not fully implemented yet.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__init__
documentation:
Declares global variables.
During testing, we found the garbage collector would slow down sampling enough to cause a
lot of dropped samples.
We've tried to combat this by allocating as much as possible in advance.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.setStartTrigger
documentation: Controls the conditions when the sampleEngine starts recording measurements.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.setStopTrigger
documentation: Controls the conditions when the sampleEngine stops recording measurements.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.setTriggerChannel
documentation:
Sets channel that controls the trigger.
triggerChannel:  selected from sampleEngine.channels

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.ConsoleOutput
documentation:
Enables or disables the display of realtime measurements
boolValue:  True == Enable, False == Disable

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.enableChannel
documentation:
Enables a channel.  Takes sampleEngine.channel class value as input.
channel: selected from sampleEngine.channels

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.disableChannel
documentation:
Disables a channel.  Takes sampleEngine.channel class value as input.
channel: selected from sampleEngine.channels

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.enableCSVOutput
documentation:
Opens a file and causes the sampleEngine to periodically output samples when taking
measurements
filename: The file measurements will be output to.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.disableCSVOutput
documentation: Closes the CSV file if open and disables CSV output.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__ClearOutput
documentation: Wipes away all of the old output data.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__isCalibrated
documentation: Returns true if every channel has sufficient calibration samples.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__addMeasurement
documentation:
Adds measurements to the global list of measurements.
channel: selected from sampleEngine.channels
measurement:  An 1xn array of measurements.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__evalStartTrigger
documentation:
See if any of the measurements meet the conditions to start recording samples.
measurement:  a 1xn array.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__evalStopTrigger
documentation:
See if any of the measurements meet the conditions to stop recording samples.
measurement:  a 1xn array of measurements.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__vectorProcess
documentation:
Translates raw ADC measurements into current values.
measurements:  An nxm array of integers indexed by the global channel index scheme.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__processPacket
documentation:
Separates received packets into ZeroCal, RefCal, and measurement samples.
measurements:  an nxm array of swizzled packets from the Power Monitor

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__startupCheck
documentation: Verify the sample engine is setup to start.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__processZeroCal
documentation:
Adds raw measurement data to the zeroCal tracker
meas:  Zerocal measurements indexed by the global channel index scheme.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__processRefCal
documentation:
Adds raw measurement data to the refcal tracker        
meas:  RefCal measurements indexed by the global channel index scheme.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.getSamples
documentation:
Returns samples in a Python list.  Format is: 
[timestamp, main, usb, aux,mainVolts,usbVolts].

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__outputToCSV
documentation:
This is intended to be called periodically during sampling.
The alternative is to store measurements in an array or queue, which will overflow allocated
memory within a few hours depending on system settings.
Writes measurements to a CSV file

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__arrangeSamples
documentation:
Arranges output lists so they're a bit easier to process.
exportAllIndices:  Populates the list with every channel, even if no measurements are stored for that channel.
Useful for making sure the indices in sampleEngine.channels match the output from this function.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.outputCSVHeaders
documentation: Creates column headers in the CSV output file for each enabled channel.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__sampleLoop
documentation:
Collects and processes samples in batches.  Numpy makes processing large numbers of samples in batches
much faster than processing them as they're received.  Useful in avoiding dropped samples.  
S: The number of samples in the current batch.
Samples: An array that will be populated with samples.
ProcessRate: Number of samples per batch.  Should be a power of 2 for best results.
legacy_timestamp:  if true, use time.time() for timestamp instead of currentTime - startTime

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.__startSampling
documentation:
Handle setup for sample collection.
samples:  Number of samples to collect, independent of the stop trigger.  sampleEngine.triggers.SAMPLECOUNT_INFINITE to function solely through triggers.
granularity:  Samples to store.  1 = 1:1, 10 = store 1 out of every 10 samples, etc.  
legacy_timestamp: if true, use time.time() for timestamp instead of currentTime - startTime

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.startSampling
documentation:
Handle setup for sample collection.
samples:  Number of samples to collect, independent of the stop trigger.  sampleEngine.triggers.SAMPLECOUNT_INFINITE to function solely through triggers.
granularity:  Samples to store.  1 = 1:1, 10 = store 1 out of every 10 samples, etc.  
legacy_timestamp: if true, use time.time() for timestamp instead of currentTime - startTime

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.periodicStartSampling
documentation:
Causes the Power Monitor to enter sample mode, but doesn't actively collect samples.
Call periodicCollectSamples() periodically get measurements.

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.periodicCollectSamples
documentation:
Start sampling with periodicStartSampling(), then call this to collect samples.
Returns the most recent measurements made by the Power Monitor.
samples:  Number of samples to collect.
legacy_timestamp: if true, use time.time() for timestamp instead of currentTime - startTime

methods.name: Monsoon.sampleEngine.SampleEngine.periodicStopSampling
documentation:
Performs cleanup tasks when finished sampling.
closeCSV:  Closes the CSV file along with exiting sample mode.

classes.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.enumerateDevices
documentation:
Returns a list of the serial numbers of all devices connected to the system.
Includes both HVPM LVPM hardware

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.reconnect
documentation:
Reset the port and reconnect to the power monitor.
Useful for some cases

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.Connect
documentation:
Connect to a Power Monitor.
deviceType = LVPM or HVPM
serialno = device serial number.  If None, connect to the first device found

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.sendCommand
documentation: Send a USB Control transfer.  Normally this is used to set an EEPROM value.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.stopSampling
documentation: Send a control transfer instructing the Power Monitor to stop sampling.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.startSampling
documentation:
Instruct the Power Monitor to enter sample mode.
calTime = Amount of time, in ms, between calibration samples.
maxTime = Number of samples to take before exiting sample mode automatically.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.getValue
documentation: Get an EEPROM value from the Power Monitor.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.closeDevice
documentation: Cleanup any loose ends, if present.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.USB_protocol.verifyReady
documentation:
Check whether we're currently in sample mode.
Some commands can cause errors if we are.
Current behavior checks for all opcodes, though there are some specific ones which will not return an error code.

Uses native python usb functions to communicate with the Power Monitor.
Best choice for connecting to a single Power Monitor.

classes.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.sendCommand
documentation: Send a USB Control transfer.  Normally this is used to set an EEPROM value.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.stopSampling
documentation: Send a control transfer instructing the Power Monitor to stop sampling.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.startSampling
documentation:
Instruct the Power Monitor to enter sample mode.
calTime = Amount of time, in ms, between calibration samples.
maxTime = Number of samples to take before exiting sample mode automatically.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.getValue
documentation: Get an EEPROM value from the Power Monitor.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.closeDevice
documentation: Cleanup any loose ends, if present.

methods.name: Monsoon.pmapi.CPP_Backend_Protocol.loadLibrary
documentation: Tries to load the library in an OS-neutral way.

Uses C++ backend with libusb.
When connecting to multiple Power Monitors with the same computer, native Python code is often too slow, and results in many dropped samples.
This offloads the the time-critical parts of sample collection to C++, but isn't compatible with every OS yet.

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.amps_from_raw
documentation: Translate EEPROM overcurrent protection value setting into amps.

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.raw_from_amps
documentation: Translate amp setting for overcurrent protection into EEPROM value

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setVout
documentation: Set Vout.  Valid values from 2.01-4.55.  0 = turn off.

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setPowerupTime
documentation: time in ms where powerupcurrentlimit applies, vs runtimecurrentlimit

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setPowerUpCurrentLimit
documentation: Sets power up current limit.  Valid values are 0-8 Amps

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setRunTimeCurrentLimit
documentation: Sets runtime current limit.  Valid values are 0-8 amps.

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setUSBCoarseZeroOffset
documentation: Zero offset, not used in LVPM

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setUSBPassthroughMode
documentation: USB Passthrough mode.  0 = off, 1 = on, 2 = auto

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setVoltageChannel
documentation: Sets voltage measurement channel.  0 = Main & USB, 1 = Main & Aux

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.getVoltageChannel
documentation: 0 = Main & USB, 1 = Main & Aux

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.getSerialNumber
documentation: Get the device serial number

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.setDefaultScaleValues
documentation: Not implemented for LVPM yet

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.fillStatusPacket
documentation: Get all calibration information from the device EEPROM

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.BulkRead
documentation:
Read sample packets.
Returns an array of 64 byte packets concatenated together.
Number of packets depends on the protocol selected.

methods.name: Monsoon.LVPM.Monsoon.swizzlePacket
documentation: Byte order for 2-byte values is swapped for the majority of the measurement packet.  This fixes that.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.setup_usb
documentation: Sets up the USB connection.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__bootCommand
documentation: Sends boot command.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.writeFlash
documentation: Writes a hex file to the Power Monitor's PIC.  Uses Intel HEX file format.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__writeRegion
documentation: Writes information to a memory region.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__compare
documentation: Compare read data to the data we think we wrote.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__byteLine
documentation: Translate a HEX file line into address, linetype, data, and checksum

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.getHeaderFromFWM
documentation:
Strips the header from a Monsoon FWM file, returns the HEX file and the formatted header.
Header format [VID,PID,Rev,Model]

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.getHexFile
documentation: Reads an Intel HEX file.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__formatHex
documentation: Takes raw hex_ input, and turns it into an array of hex_ lines.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.__formatAsPICFlash
documentation: Formats an array of hex_ lines as PIC memory regions.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.verifyHeader
documentation: Verifies the header matches the physical hardware being reflashed.

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.getSerialNumber
documentation: The bootloader lacks a get command for the serial number, but we can just read the EEPROM value directly with the appropriate boot command

methods.name: Monsoon.reflash.bootloaderMonsoon.resetToMainSection
documentation:
Exits bootloader mode and returns to normal mode.
This will disconnect the device, and you should reconnect with HVPM.py or LVPM.py, depending on your hardware.
Most LVPM units have an older version of the bootloader, and this command may be nonfunctional on them.  
In that case, just manually power cycle the unit.
